stop_conditions: Any attempt to execute B04_R6_LEARNED_ROUTER_AUTHORIZATION without the third same-head rerun actually earning router superiority.
Any attempt to treat LAB_READINESS_CEILING_FROZEN as counted readiness or a reopening trigger by itself.
Any attempt to prepare a later router-readiness reconsideration input without a future gate packet first earning material_change_earned = true.
Any alternate tool, helper, wrapper, or packet emitter prepares router-readiness reconsideration input outside KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/router/run_router_readiness_reconsideration_input.py.
Any consumer parses or relies on kt.router_readiness_reconsideration_input.v1 without first passing through KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/operator/router_readiness_reconsideration_input_validate.py.
Any future tool-side touch of kt.router_readiness_reconsideration_input.v1 appears outside the sanctioned emitter/consumer pair and causes the single-path enforcement receipt to fail.
Any future router-readiness reconsideration input is prepared or consumed using a stale single-path enforcement receipt from another head.
Any future router-readiness reconsideration input is prepared or consumed without a fresh preserved-basis receipt on the actual candidate head.
Any future reconsideration narrative treats PRE_SEAL_HOLD_STATE_BASIS_CONFIRMED as same-head authority instead of preserved basis only.
Any claim that the completed second rerun static hold or any lab readiness packet earns router superiority.
Any externality widening above E1, external comparative claim, or commercial activation is folded into the post-rerun hold state.
Any broader lab improvement work is narrated as counted reopening without this separate lawful launch surface.
A PASS reconsideration adjudication receipt is treated as a counted R5 rerun or as learned-router authorization.
The third same-head R5 rerun launch surface is treated as a rerun result or as earned superiority.
Any claim that the third same-head rerun procedure PASS itself earns router superiority.
